phases.name: Define Problem
phases.description: Identifying the core issue, setting SMART goals, outlining constraints and deliverables.

phases.name: Generate Concepts
phases.description: Brainstorming, research, prototyping, and decision matrices to evaluate potential solutions.

phases.name: Develop Solution
phases.description: Creating CAD, detailed sketches, math calculations, graphical models, and pseudocode.

phases.name: Construct and Test
phases.description: Building the robot, writing the code, executing test plans, and gathering qualitative/quantitative data.

phases.name: Evaluate Solution
phases.description: Reflecting on constraints, event outcomes, and planning future improvements.
